active_arcs: Elisa’s control to surrender arc begins; she hides a secret fire that foreshadows rebellion.  Memory’s volatility is introduced via glass fruit.  Grief surfaces as a shared loss among the agents.  Ambition is shown in competitive manuscript edits.
next_targets: Mara’s theft of the glass fruit leads to a desperate attempt to reclaim it.
Elisa’s hidden fire resurfaces, threatening the orchard.
The group’s rivalry turns into a direct confrontation.
Elisa’s secret fully revealed; the glass fruit’s memory‑altering power is exploited; the agents’ rivalry escalates into sabotage.
Mara’s motive for stealing the glass fruit, potentially tied to her own hidden grief or ambition.
global_targets: Elisa’s control to surrender arc begins; she hides a secret fire that foreshadows rebellion.  Memory’s volatility is introduced via glass fruit.  Grief surfaces as a shared loss among the agents.  Ambition is shown in competitive manuscript edits.

outline_notes: Introduce the glass fruit rule early to anchor the world.
Show the first hint of Elisa’s secret fire through a visual: a smoldering ember in a glass vial.
Use the shattered fruit as a symbol of broken memory and rising tension.

vote_summary.reason: Fast mode skips critic, continuity, editor, and voting. Pass --deep-review to enable critic and editor review.

architect.chapter_goal: Escalate the rivalry by forcing Elisa and Mara into a desperate bid to recover the shattered glass fruit, deepen grief and ambition, and plant a new unresolved thread about a hidden second glass fruit.
architect.theme_progress: Grief intensifies as the broken fruit releases a wave of collective sorrow; ambition sharpens as each agent sees the fruit as leverage; memory becomes volatile when fragments of the shattered glass begin to echo the lost orchard.
arc_targets: Elisa’s control to surrender arc begins; she hides a secret fire that foreshadows rebellion.
Memory’s volatility is heightened by the shattered fruit’s lingering shards.
Grief surfaces as a shared loss among the agents.
next_arc_targets: Mara’s theft of the glass fruit leads to a desperate attempt to reclaim it.
Elisa’s hidden fire resurfaces, threatening the orchard.
The group’s rivalry turns into a direct confrontation.

recommended_beats: Opening image: shards of glass glint like frozen tears on the floor.
Inciting incident: Elisa discovers a second, intact glass fruit hidden in a drawer.
Rising conflict: Mara, believing the fruit is lost, threatens to expose Elisa’s secret fire unless she hands over the manuscript.
Midpoint twist: The shattered fragments begin to replay the memory of the orchard fire, forcing all agents to relive grief.
Climactic turn: Elisa ignites a small ember to melt a fragment, risking the orchard’s ancient glass trees.
Resolution seed: The ember creates a new glass bloom, hinting at a future source of power.
constraints: Lyrical voice with moderate metaphor density (≈0.65).
Dialogue must be purposeful; keep density around 0.45.
outline_notes: Use the glass shards as visual motif for broken memory.
Tie the ember to Elisa’s hidden fire, showing it physically for the first time.
Show Mara’s ambition through her willingness to bargain with grief.
Insert a line of internal monologue for Elisa that hints at her fear of surrender.
Add 'second glass fruit hidden in drawer' to carry‑over objects.
Record that shattered shards can replay memories when exposed to moonlight.
Mark new unresolved thread: the emergent glass bloom’s unknown power.
risks: Potential over‑exposition of glass‑fruit rules; keep explanation terse.
Balancing grief flashbacks with forward momentum may slow pace.
Ensuring the new unresolved thread (second fruit) feels natural, not forced.

emotional_targets: Grief intensifies as the broken fruit releases a wave of collective sorrow; ambition sharpens as each agent sees the fruit as leverage; memory becomes volatile when fragments of the shattered glass begin to echo the lost orchard.

character_notes.contradiction: heir pulled toward control to surrender
character_notes.secret_pressure: She caused the first orchard fire.

chapter_planner.chapter_hook: When the broken fruit sang the orchard’s dying fire, Elisa realized the only way to silence it was to set a new blaze.
arc_payoffs: Elisa’s secret fire becomes a tangible threat, moving her arc toward surrender.
The shattered glass amplifies memory volatility, setting up future manipulation.
Mara’s ambition is spotlighted, deepening the mystery of her motive.
next_chapter_seed: The newly formed glass bloom pulses with captured sorrow, and a silent messenger arrives bearing a sealed manuscript that claims to contain the true ending of the book.

scene_cards.goal: Establish the aftermath of the shattered fruit and introduce the hidden second fruit.
scene_cards.conflict: Elisa must decide whether to reveal the second fruit to the group or keep it secret.
scene_cards.turn: She finds the fruit tucked in a drawer, its surface humming with moonlight.
scene_cards.image: A lone glass orb rests on a rain‑slick desk, reflecting the dim lantern like a captured moon.

scene_cards.goal: Mara pressures Elisa, leveraging the manuscript as bait.
scene_cards.conflict: Mara threatens to expose Elisa’s secret fire unless she hands over the draft.
scene_cards.turn: Mara reveals a torn page that describes a firestorm, hinting she knows Elisa’s secret.
scene_cards.image: Mara’s hand grips a charred manuscript, ash drifting like a dying star.

scene_cards.goal: Memory flashback: shattered shards replay the orchard fire.
scene_cards.conflict: All agents are forced to relive the grief, weakening their resolve.
scene_cards.turn: The shards emit a low hum, projecting the scent of smoke and the crackle of flames.
scene_cards.image: Glass fragments float in the air, each a tiny mirror showing the burning orchard.

scene_cards.goal: Elisa attempts to melt a shard to stop the echo.
scene_cards.conflict: Igniting the ember risks spreading fire to the ancient glass trees of the orchard.
scene_cards.turn: She lights the ember, and a controlled blaze consumes the shard, but a spark jumps.
scene_cards.image: A single ember blooms into a blue‑flamed flower, its petals of glass shattering outward.

scene_cards.goal: Set up the new unresolved thread.
scene_cards.conflict: The ember’s heat creates a fresh glass bloom that begins to pulse with unknown power.
scene_cards.turn: Elisa realizes the bloom could be a second source of memory‑altering glass.
scene_cards.image: A newborn glass flower opens, its core glowing like a captive sunrise.

chapter_planner.cliffhanger: The glass bloom pulses, and a distant voice whispers the title of a chapter none of them have written yet.
